title: Dunleavy administration may divert federal oil revenue from North Slope
summary: James Brooks Alaska Beacon Alaska Gov. Mike Dunleavy’s administration is proposing to divert money from a program intended to compensate North Slope communities for the side effects of oil and gas drilling on federal land near them. As Dunleavy prepares to unveil a long-term fiscal plan, the state is proposing to use at least some of that money across Alaska instead. “Definitely a big deal,” said Alexei Painter, director of the Legislative Finance Division, which analyzes the budget on behalf of legislators. The National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska Impact Mitigation Grant Program sends millions of dollars from the federal government to North Slope communities each yea...

title: AST Deceased Person: North Pole [AK26000852]
summary: On January 4, 2026, at approximately 10:50 hours, AST responded to a notification of a deceased individual in North Pole. The remains have been released to the assigned funeral home. The investigation is ongoing.
